name: cli-systems-lab
description: Build, audit, modernize, debug, and redesign CLI and TUI applications with stack-aware workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, redesign, review, and debug CLI and TUI systems with stack-aware workflows
interface.longDescription: Use CLI Systems Lab to triage terminal applications, generate repo-aware audit and fix-plan artifacts, modernize command architecture, design better onboarding and dashboard surfaces, and find logic bugs across Go, Python, Node.js, Rust, and shell-based CLI systems.
defaultPrompt: Triage this CLI repo and choose the right improvement workflow.
Generate an audit and fix plan for this terminal application.
Find bugs and turn the top findings into patches.
Design a better CLI onboarding flow or TUI dashboard for this repo.
Generate a stack-aware CLI UI patch plan for this codebase.
Scaffold a CLI or TUI starter template for this stack.
Split this CLI UI problem into a narrower pattern-level starter.
Preview the available CLI UI starter templates before scaffolding.
Show a CLI UI starter with a sample terminal output before scaffolding.
Verify scaffolded CLI UI starter previews against golden snapshots.
